class AbsScene {
    InitResult initialize(Url fxml)
    void setMenuBar(MenuBar menuBar, Parent root)

}

class AbsScene$InitResult {
    Parent root
    AbsSceneController controller
    InitResult(Parent root, AbsSceneController controller)
}
